donotmodify.description: This field is used to indicate that the JSON file should not be changed by an AI agent, as it has been manually modified.

name.description: The name of the ROS 2 node, e.g 'talker'

summary.description: A concise summary of the node's functionality.

overview.description: A longer description of the node's functionality

repo.description: The path to the repository where the node's source code is located.

package.description: The name of the ROS 2 package containing the node.

itype.description: The type of interface, which can be one of the following: 'publisher', 'subscriber', 'service', 'client', 'action server', or 'action client'.

topic.description: The name of the topic, service, or action.

mtype.description: The message type used by the interface.

summary.description: A concise summary of the interface's functionality.

items.description: example of how to run the node using the `ros2 run` command.
